titleStmt.title: SII 22.234: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 234. (A.R. No. 234 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—32nd YEAR (A.D. 1043-44).

summary.p: The inscription has the introduction Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc. It is damaged. It registers a sale of land similar to that mentioned in No. 233 above, to the temple of Tiruppaṉaṅgāḍuḍaiya-Mahādēva at Vanpākkam in [Kaḻu]mala-nāḍu by the sabhā of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum porcceyappāvaiyum cirttanic celviyun=taṉ
perunteviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭutuyarūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvana velippaṭa
r vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
porukaṭaliḻattaraicartamuṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ teviya roṅkeḻil
muṭiyu muṉnavarpakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cun=taramuṭiyu min=tiraṉā
ramum teṇṭirai yiḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatu meṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ
Urimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velai
ttolperuṅkāvalp pal paḻantivuñ ceruviṟciṉavil lirupa
ttorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa melvaruñ cān=timaṟṟi
va muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta caya
ḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyiraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum
navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakoṭṭamu muti(ṉā)r vaṭaval
lai maturamaṇṭalamu kāmiṭaivaḷaiy nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñ
cilaiviraṟ pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaipaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil veṇ
kirtti yātinakaravaiyiṟ cantiran tolkulattintiravirataṉai viḷaiyamar kaḷattu
kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palapalataṉattoṭu niṟaikulattaṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ
ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcaṟacer ṉaṟkocalaināṭu n=tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai
yaḻittu vaṇṭuraicolait taṇṭaputtiyu miraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakir
ttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=tan māviḻintoṭat taṅkāta(l) cāral vaṅkāḷateca
mun toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkoṭṭa mahipālaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal
yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilaneṭuṅkaṭa luttaralāṭamum
veṟimalaṟ tirtta teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭalnaṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkavanmaṉākiya kiṭā
rattaraiyan vākayam porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya pe kkamu mārttavaṉ nakar port
toḻilvācalil viccātiratoraṇamu moyttoḷiṟ punamaṇippu tavamum parumaṇikkatavamum caiyamum tuṟainirppannaiyu
m vaṉmalaiyūreyiṟṟoṉmalaiyūru māḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkā cokamuṅ kāppuṟuniṟaipuṉal māpappā
caiyu mevilipaṅkamu kaḷaippantūṟuṭai viḷaippantūṟu n=talaittakkor pukaḻ kalaittakkolamu titamāval viṉai mātamaliṅka
mākkaṭun=tiṟa lilāmuritecamum tenakkavārpoḻil mānakkavāramun=toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māpperu n=taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecari
panmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājentracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 32 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūrkkoṭṭattu kaḻu
malanāṭṭu vanpākkattu sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷūrt tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiya mahādevarkku taṉ sa
yāṟku viṟṟukkuṭukkiṟa nilam kiḻpāṟkellai yittevar tevatānamāṉa viṟa tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiyārkkum Innāṭṭu vaḷḷai kuḷattellaikku meṟ
kku tenpāṟkellai kāḻiyūrnāṭṭup panampūrellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai kāṭṭerikku kiḻakku meṟkil veḷḷaikkuḻiyum Ikkuḷat
m teṟkku nokki kāṭṭeri melai koyil kottame teṟkku ṉokki Eṅkaḷ vilaikoḷ vum Ivveḷḷaikkuḻi
kulaikku Ikkottame coḻapāṇṭiya kkoyiṟṟu Ivvellai kaḷukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai coḻapāṇṭiyap perāṟṟukkut
teṟkkum Iṉnāṉkellaiyilumuṭpaṭṭa nilattil Ittevar tevatāna māṉa nilat nilaṅkāṭṭerikku vaṭakkāṭṭeri kiḻ
nilamoruveliyuṭpaṭa koḷaṅkallu kuṅkuḻiyu muṭṭattu ṉān kellaiyuḷḷuṭpaṭṭa nilatti leṅkaḷ nila
llām Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ātidāsaśaṇḍeśvaraṟku vaṉpākkattil sabhaiyom patiṉe
kku Uṭpaṭṭa kāṭṭerikku Eṅkaḷūr teṟkil po ppaḷḷattūmpil teṟṟil koṟpukkāl ye nirkoṭupotu pāccikkoḷḷa
m Innilattāl vanta koyil pācco ponta Eppeṟpaṭṭa ṉavum nāṅkaḷe yiṟuppatākavum Ipparicu tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiya Ātidāsa
śaṇḍeśvararpakkal Iṉnilattukku vilaidravyamu [ miṟai] ttiravyamu maṟak koṇṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟu
yituveyākavu mituvallatu
Digital edition of SII 22.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
